promotionDelta: Generate and verify source/package/registry/docs outputs and the public subpath export.
Record semantic structure, long content, 320 CSS pixel, 200% text, and 400% zoom browser evidence.
Complete current Risk Class 3 keyboard, screen-reader, speech, switch, touch, RTL, and forced-colors evidence at the blueprint-required depth.
Pass strict types, SSR/hydration where applicable, axe, ARIA review, and supported-browser interaction gates.
Pass packed Next.js and Vite consumers plus package/source parity without workspace links.
Add Semantic Sync clean-update, customized-update, conflict, rollback, and removal fixtures.
Verify every prepared state, localized string, unbroken value, empty case, and consumer styling escape hatch.
Publish an approved Quality Passport and dogfood the generated output on the public site.
Measure the documented large-content strategy and either prove bounded native scrolling or implement virtualization with intact semantics before Stable promotion.
